narrative_role: Atto I, climax — la leadership che resiste alla tempesta.

prompt_components.subject: a captain figure standing at the top of a wooden ship's stairway, in complete backlight against a stormy sky
prompt_components.action: the captain shouts silent orders to the crew (no audible voice), gestures with one arm with decisive authority, a long coat flapping in the wind; a lightning bolt cracks behind them mid-shot, silhouetting them sharply
prompt_components.environment: stormy ship deck at night, rain pouring, dark waves visible beyond the rail, masts straining
prompt_components.camera_movement: completely static, the chaos around moves but the camera does not
prompt_components.lighting: near-black except for two flashes of cold blue lightning that briefly illuminate the captain's silhouette
prompt_components.mood: heroic, calm in chaos, the figure of command
prompt_components.audio_hint: heavy rain, howling wind, rolling thunder, a deafening single thunderclap synced with the lightning flash, no music

acceptance_criteria: Il capitano in silhouette totale, mai volto visibile
Almeno un lampo durante il clip
